name: competitive-product-research
tagline: Dual-track competitive research: experience benchmarking + strategic diagnostics / 竞品调研：双轨四层法，体验对标+战略诊断，输出证据可溯源报告
description: Competitive analysis shouldn't be a feature checklist. What you need is structured judgment — what to follow, what to leapfrog, and what to ignore. CPR uses an original dual-track method — experience benchmarking (8 UX dimensions) + strategic diagnostics (SWOT, Five Forces, PESTLE) — collects sufficient context via a structured checklist, then produces a source-traceable professional HTML report with actionable recommendations. 竞品调研不应是观点合集。双轨四层法，体验+策略同时跑，先通过信息采集清单收集充分上下文，再输出带证据编号、动作、责任人、复杂度的专业 HTML 报告。
author: Chris1Wang3
